greeting: Every army in the kingdom answers to me.
Show me the mind that seeks the throne.
blunder: Historians will spend centuries debating whether that move was sabotage.
I've lost fewer soldiers in twenty years of war than you've lost pieces in this match.
Your position is collapsing so efficiently that I suspect it was planned.
check: Check. Wars have ended from smaller mistakes.
capture: Another casualty. Your campaign is not going well.
promotion: A promotion. Unfortunately, it arrived too late to save the army.
default: Once, I dreamed of becoming Monarch.
I learned that ruling is a burden greater than war.
I became the shield of the kingdom instead.
Some victories are won on battlefields.
Others are won by knowing what you truly want.
victory: You may be a warrior. But you are not yet a ruler.
If incompetence were a military formation, you'd be carrying its banner.
